name: Findologic E-Commerce Search and Navigation API
what_it_does: E-commerce search and navigation optimization platform with REST API — enabling online retailers to implement intelligent product search, category navigation ("Smart Suggest"), and AI-powered product recommendations, with a feed-based catalog system and merchandising console, primarily serving European mid-market e-commerce merchants on Shopify, Magento, and WooCommerce.
use_cases: Implementing intelligent product search via Findologic API for European e-commerce stores
Building Smart Suggest navigation via Findologic for category and filter optimization
Syncing product catalog via Findologic Feed API for real-time product data ingestion
Adding AI product recommendations via Findologic for upsell and cross-sell widgets
Configuring search merchandising via Findologic for product ranking and promotion
not_for: Non-e-commerce search (Findologic is exclusively product search for retail)
Very small catalogs under 500 products (basic WooCommerce/Shopify search sufficient)
US-centric retailers without European focus (Findologic is Austrian/European market)
best_when: A European e-commerce retailer needs AI-powered product search and navigation — where Findologic provides GDPR-compliant search optimization with deep integration for Shopify, Magento, and WooCommerce.
avoid_when: You're a US-only retailer, need general-purpose search, or have a very small product catalog.

auth.notes: Shop key (service ID) for search API calls — embedded in query parameters (public). Feed API uses separate authentication for catalog ingestion. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. PHP and JavaScript SDK/plugins. Platform plugins for Shopify, Magento 2, WooCommerce. No webhooks.

pricing.paid_tiers: Mid-market pricing: custom based on shop revenue/search volume; typically €500-3,000+/month
pricing.notes: Austrian company (Salzburg). Founded 2008 by Christoph Rainer and Dominik Wohlfahrt. Bootstrapped profitable. European market focus. 500+ online shops. Customers: Tchibo, Baur, Baby Walz, BIPA, Kastner & Öhler. GDPR by design (Austrian company). Shopify App, Magento 2 module, WooCommerce plugin. Smart Suggest: predictive navigation. DirectIntegration API (JSON). Export feed for catalog. A/B testing. Analytics. Popular in German-speaking markets (Austria, Germany, Switzerland). Less known internationally.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with shop key. PHP/JS SDKs. No webhooks. GDPR compliant. Austrian company (EU). Annual contract. European market focus. Platform plugins (Shopify/Magento/WooCommerce) preferred over raw API. Feed-based catalog ingestion.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Search queries fully idempotent. Catalog feed: product ID is key for deduplication. Navigation reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Austrian/German market focus — documentation may be partially in German
Shop key (serviceId) is public (embedded in JS) — separate from feed/management auth
Feed-based catalog: not real-time individual product updates; send full or delta feed
Annual contract required — not self-service for production
GDPR by design — Austrian company under strict EU data protection
Platform plugins (Shopify/Magento/WooCommerce) handle most complexity — raw API for headless only

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Austrian company (EU). Shop key public (search queries). Feed auth for catalog management. No OAuth2. EU/Austria data residency. Customer search behavior is GDPR-sensitive. Annual contract includes DPA. Bootstrapped — security is limited to what's needed.
